fields.description: The bare subdomain label, unique across the fleet. The site is reachable at <subdomain>.<region>.frappe.dev. This is the routing key the proxy stores in its live map.
fields.label: Subdomain

fields.description: Which regional proxy fleet fronts this subdomain. Every proxy VM in the region gets the full set of active subdomains for the region.
fields.label: Region

fields.description: Inactive subdomains are excluded from the desired map the proxy serves (the row stays for history). Toggle off to take a site off the front door without deleting the mapping.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: The site VM this subdomain points at. The proxy dials its public IPv6 :80 (plaintext) over the v6 internet.
fields.label: Virtual Machine

fields.description: The target VM's public IPv6 /128, denormalized so the desired map is a single query with no join. Kept in sync with the linked VM's ipv6_address on save.
fields.label: Address
